channel.title: SalahDin Rezk Blog
channel.description: Essays and technical writing from SalahDin Rezk.

item.title: Embrace Death
item.description: Death, the most detested of the experience (i.e. life) from the majority of whom endure. People hate, avoid, and even fight it, but no matter the struggle with that edifice, it will devour you and everyone close to your heart. You will have—even if you hate to—accept it.
